name: Quality Gate
overview: Restrict users to specific media versions based on configurable path-based policies.
description: Quality Gate allows Jellyfin administrators to define policies that restrict certain users to specific media versions. Features include: Default policy for all users, per-user overrides, full access exemptions, middleware filtering to hide blocked versions from UI, and auto-fallback to allowed versions.

versions.changelog: Initial release with default policy support, user overrides, middleware filtering, and auto-fallback.
